title: delphinium intermedium subsp. alpestre
intro: Delphinium intermedium subsp. alpestre is a subspecies of the delphinium plant, belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. It is a perennial plant that is native to mountainous regions and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throat. Herbal preparations of Delphinium intermedium subsp. alpestre can be found in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and are often used to promote respiratory health and immune function.
